description: AI pipeline that generates 8 custom prospect assets after Call 1 to increase Call 2 show rates for Quantum Scaling reps

project_overview.what: Deal Forge is an internal sales tool for Quantum Scaling reps. After completing a Call 1 (Business Audit), the rep triggers the app with the Fireflies meeting ID. An AI pipeline extracts the prospect's ICP and business context, then generates 8 custom assets: a verified lead list, branded calendar invite visual, registration page mock-up, 3 webinar title options, an interactive ROI calculator pre-populated with their numbers, a follow-up email sequence, and a brand-scraped prospect profile. All assets are ready before Call 2.
project_overview.why: QS's Call 2 show rate is 37.5% — the core constraint on revenue. Prospects feel informed after Call 1 and have no strong pull to return. Deal Forge creates a concrete bridge: assets so specific to the prospect that skipping Call 2 means walking away from something already built for them. The 'sunk cost' and perceived value dramatically increase show rate and close rate.
project_overview.end_state: A polished internal rep dashboard used for every Call 2 booking. Rep selects today's calls from auto-loaded Fireflies meetings, clicks Generate, and has a full asset package ready within 20 minutes. The ROI model and reg page mock have shareable prospect-facing URLs. Eventually expands to full CRM integration and automated follow-up.
project_overview.current_summary: Backend architecture phase. Schema designed and applied to Supabase (project lcryrllxityssyamcvst). Railway project created (ID: 8839ef6c-015c-455e-a75a-8bb8f82c43a2). Task-spec in progress — extract task fully specced, brand_scrape next. Fireflies API isolated and validated. Ample Leads integration pending (team member to provide actor ID + credentials). UX not yet started — blocked on /task-spec completion for all 8 tasks.

resume_here: Mid /task-spec run. Extract task fully specced (all 11 sections complete). Next: spec brand_scrape — need decisions on (1) exact fields to scrape (logo URL, brand colors, tagline, description), (2) whether prospect_website is required or optional at job creation. Then continue through lead_list, webinar_titles, roi_model, email_sequence, calendar_visual, reg_page.

recent_milestones.description: Problem validated: Call 2 show rate 37.5% confirmed as core revenue constraint
8-task pipeline architecture designed and approved (batch-design + state-machine)
Schema designed, reviewed, and applied to Supabase (sales_assets schema, jobs + tasks tables)
Fireflies API isolated and validated — Notes field confirmed as primary extraction source
/task-spec skill created — mandatory 11-section gate before any task code is written
extract task fully specced (all 11 sections: input contract, Claude prompt written, error handling table, data flow diagram)

decision_log.decision: Separate Supabase project (not shared with QS Dashboard)
decision_log.reasoning: Every existing app (Call Grader, CompeteIQ, QS Dashboard) has its own Supabase project. Sharing would mix concerns and compete for connection limits.

decision_log.decision: Hard delete on jobs (no soft delete)
decision_log.reasoning: Job records are operational queue state, not compliance records. Assets persist in Supabase Storage independently. Hard delete with CASCADE is simpler and sufficient.

decision_log.decision: ROI model built as interactive HTML page (not spreadsheet)
decision_log.reasoning: Opens in browser alongside other assets. Pre-populated with extracted LTV. Progressive disclosure rep view + shareable prospect view (?view=prospect). Easy to build (~2.5 hours), better than Excel in sales context.

decision_log.decision: lead_list task uses 4-step sub-pipeline (ICP extraction → lead fetch → website crawl → ICP match filter)
decision_log.reasoning: Raw Apify/Ample Leads results are low quality (~50% irrelevant). Website crawl + Claude ICP classification filters to 25 verified matches. Rep credibility depends on lead quality.

decision_log.decision: extract task writes to jobs.extracted_data (not tasks.output_data)
decision_log.reasoning: All 5 Stage 2 tasks need the extracted data. Writing to the job record makes it accessible to all downstream tasks without joins through the tasks table.

decision_log.decision: Webinar slides cut from asset list
decision_log.reasoning: Gamma has no API. Slides require full narrative depth impossible from a 30-min call. Would require knowing their complete value proposition.
